subcodes.title: Words to Arab villagers from Adasiyyah, spoken on 1914-05-07
subcodes.first_line: Consider that Abdu'r-Rahman Pasha receives one forth of the entire crop and produce from the farmers in his village
subcodes.subjects: @agriculture, @education of children; moral education, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @work as worship, @thankfulness; gratitude, @excellence; distinction
